issues.description: testcov: coverage combine exits 1 (No data to combine) without parallel=true — CI test job fails on every push
issues.resolution: Replaced testcov target with pytest --cov=mcp_cendoj --cov-report=html --cov-report=term-missing (Option B)

issues.description: lint CI job missing fetch-depth: 0 while typecheck and test jobs have it — fragile with hatch-vcs
issues.resolution: Added fetch-depth: 0 to lint job checkout step, consistent with other jobs

issues.description: C901 in ignore list neutralises C90/mccabe selection — max-complexity = 14 never fires
issues.resolution: Removed C901 from ignore — mccabe complexity now enforced at max-complexity = 14 (Option A)

issues.description: Q (flake8-quotes) rules in extend-select is a documented ruff anti-pattern when used with the ruff formatter
issues.resolution: Removed Q from extend-select — formatter already enforces quote style

issues.description: No fallback-version in [tool.hatch.version] — tagless environments get 0.0.0+unknown
FA (flake8-future-annotations) rules are no-ops on Python 3.13+ and cause unnecessary churn
issues.resolution: Removed FA from extend-select — project requires Python >=3.13

issues.description: No fail_under threshold — coverage can silently drop to 0% with no CI signal
No AGENTS.md exists — plan compliance with project hard rules cannot be verified
issues.resolution: Project has no AGENTS.md — validator limitation, not a plan defect. Resolved as N/A.

issues.description: Task format lacks explicit per-task acceptance criteria
issues.resolution: Tasks have sufficient descriptions and completion checkboxes for a tooling-only plan. Resolved as acceptable.

issues.description: test_main_runs has no behavioral assertion — smoke test only
issues.resolution: main() only calls print() — smoke test is adequate for current scope.

smoke_tests.note: No integration services required for pure tooling plan

merge.note: Initial commit — no PR/MR needed (no prior base branch)
